name: rig
description: rig — a LEGO-style harness composer. Compose bricks (facets/patterns/steps/recipes) at invocation time into a task-specific agent harness. Domain-agnostic engine: dev-flow orchestration (review, implement, PR), pluggable domain packs (e.g. sales deal-review), and a conversational mode (rig:talk) that routes natural language to the right flow. Claude Code native; no heavy DSL engine.
